prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TTX-DUFFELBAG-16IN-BLK Product Type: DUFFEL_BAG Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Square 16 Inch Gear Bag Everyday Carry Travel Duffel, Black Description: Packable, foldable, machine washable and durable, ToolTreaux’s 16 inch duffel bag is a reliable and convenient small sized everyday carry, storage, travel or tool bag, boating a minimalist design and sturdy fabrication.

Made from durable polyester, this small duffel bag offers excellent resistance to wear and tear, making it ideal for daily use, travel, gym sessions or as a tools and equipment bag. The spacious, rectangular shaped main compartment provides ample room for essentials, while the built in handles offer comfortable lifting and carrying.

Whether you're storing tools and equipment, need an additional travel bag or carry on bag, or simply need a reliable everyday carry, this minimalist black duffel bag is built to keep you organized and on the go without weighing you down.

16 x 8 x 8 inches Search Terms: duffel bag for travel; gym bag; tool bag; carry on luggage; gifts for men; small duffel bag; back to school; edc gear; everyday carry; weekender bag; tools Features: - 16 INCH DUFFEL BAG: Small duffel bag is a versatile, all purpose everyday carry, travel bag, gym bag or tool bag; features sturdy carry handles and zipper closure - DURABLE POLYESTER: Resistant to wear and tear for long lasting use; spacious rectangular shaped main compartment provides ample room to fit essentials - LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Weighing in at just 0.76lbs, the small duffel bag adds virtually no weight to whatever you’re packing; easily foldable material makes it great for travel - MACHINE WASHABLE: Small black duffel bag should be washed on cold cycle; air dry - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 16 x 8 x 8 inches; Weight: 0.76lbs; Color: Black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Packable And Foldable, Machine Washable, Durable Polyester, Lightweight At 076Lbs, Everyday Carry Travel Gym Tool Bag

openai.title_differentiation: Foldable, Machine Washable, Durable Polyester, Lightweight, Carry Handles, Zipper Closure, Travel Ready
